replies.msg: 用開spotify 唔識, 不過幫推

Sorry to start things off on a down note, but if you're running iOS 8.4, iOS 9, or higher on your iPhone or iPod touch, you don't have access to Shake to Shuffle. Your devices still have accelerometers, but they don't support the feature anymore. No one really knows why, but


Apple removed Shake to Shuffle starting in iOS 8.4 and it hasn't come back.
